name: gladys-integration-template-js
description: Official starter template to build an external integration for Gladys Assistant with the JavaScript SDK.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/weather.js && node --check src/devices/index.js && node --check src/devices/weatherStation.js && node --check src/devices/switchDevice.js && node --check src/devices/light.js && node --check src/devices/plug.js && node --check src/devices/motionSensor.js
